package rulecoverage

func NegativeBodyBindingDoneInMiddlewareAndHandler() string {
    ruleID := "body_binding_done_in_middleware_and_handler"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Endpoints where middleware parses the body and the handler also owns body binding."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
